**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-03-18

## Context

The nightly reconciliation job previously ran on a single node with no coordination mechanism. As the system expands to multiple nodes, a distributed coordination strategy is required to ensure exactly one node executes the batch job per night. Without coordination, concurrent execution across nodes would produce duplicate r
